summary.sosovalue: Predominantly positive sentiment around Season 2 airdrop expectations, $SOSO token clarifications from co-founder debunking rumors, ongoing EXP rewards, and platform engagement. Community excitement for consistent rewards via research, staking, and tasks; minor concerns on eligibility addressed positively. High engagement on promotional/informational posts.
summary.sodex: Neutral to positive. Mentions of API closed alpha, trading promotions, and mainnet maintenance resolved smoothly. Limited independent discussion, mostly promotional or quoting official updates.
summary.ssi: Positive on staking metrics (TVL ~$94M, APY ~20.7%, 487K holders). Users discussing rewards and adding positions; viewed as attractive DeFi opportunity.
